title: Pre-launch Design Audit

sanitization.local_raw_evidence_note: Full raw evidence may exist locally in the project folder, but it is intentionally not tracked in git.

notes: This file is the repo-safe machine-readable handoff summary.
Do not treat this as approval to modify source code.
Read the markdown summaries beside this file for human-readable detail.

audit_aim.primary_goal: Establish a launch-ready design system blueprint by auditing visual consistency, semantic clarity, CA/legal trust surfaces, client-facing invoice output, profile/global MSA settings, and critical invoice creation flows.
audit_aim.design_direction: Neo-brutal, high-contrast, square geometry, hard shadows, strict borders, restrained color tokens, and plain-language support for formal legal/payment terms.
business_lens: Lance is a delivery and invoicing tracker, not only a finance table.
Money and legal terms must be accurate, visible, and trustworthy.
Client-facing invoice/share/print outputs must not leak internal or irrelevant metadata.
Profile and Global MSA are source-of-truth settings, so save reliability and legal clarity matter more than decoration.

global_constraints_for_future_agents: Do not modify application source code until the blueprint is approved or the user asks for a scoped implementation.
Use audit markdown and this JSON as repo-safe context.
Do not assume raw screenshots or raw JSON are available in the repository.
If additional scans are needed, use the already-running authenticated Chrome session over CDP on port 9222.
Do not launch a new browser instance for authenticated scans.
Preserve Neo Brutal design intent: strong black borders, hard shadows, square corners, high contrast, and restrained status colors.

committed_reports.name: Creating Invoice Draft Flow and Check Status
committed_reports.path: design_audits/2026-05-25_14_round_design_system_blueprint/CREATING INVOICE DRAFT FLOW and CHECK STATUS.md
committed_reports.purpose: Sanitized summary of a draft invoice creation attempt and post-save status visibility.

committed_reports.name: Invoice Client Surface Print Digital Share Audit
committed_reports.path: design_audits/2026-05-25_14_round_design_system_blueprint/INVOICE CLIENT SURFACE PRINT DIGITAL SHARE AUDIT.md
committed_reports.purpose: Sanitized summary of invoice preview, print, templates, share modal/share behavior, and client-facing relevance.

committed_reports.name: Profile Settings Global MSA Deep Audit
committed_reports.purpose: Sanitized summary of profile settings, banking, compliance, global MSA, upload/crop modal, and profile responsiveness.

coverage_summary.key_result: Soft UI and border-contract drift exists and needs token-level cleanup before launch.
Draft save failed in tested production state due a Supabase/PostgREST schema-cache issue involving an invoice-client relationship field.
Client-facing output needs stricter data relevance, placeholder suppression, milestone-source correctness, and final/draft context propagation.
The data model is strong, but Global MSA save reliability, legal clarity, validation, sticky layout, and responsive behavior need hardening.

critical_findings.finding: Global MSA save can silently fail while the UI still shows success.
critical_findings.risk: Agency may believe legal terms were updated while future invoices still use stale terms.
critical_findings.recommended_direction: Make profile + Global MSA save atomic or show exact partial-save recovery state.

critical_findings.finding: Draft save and share flow are blocked in tested production state by a Supabase/PostgREST schema-cache issue.
critical_findings.risk: Users cannot reliably save/share new invoices until the backend/schema mismatch is resolved.
critical_findings.recommended_direction: Resolve database/schema cache mismatch before visual polish work on draft/share flows.

critical_findings.finding: Invoice templates can expose irrelevant, placeholder, or incorrectly sourced client-facing data.
critical_findings.risk: Final invoice output can look unprofessional or legally noisy.
critical_findings.recommended_direction: Define a strict client-facing invoice data contract.

critical_findings.finding: Payment terms, late fee, revision rounds, and extra revision fee need hard validation.
critical_findings.risk: Invalid contract defaults can flow into invoices and MSA snapshots.
critical_findings.recommended_direction: Add field-level validation rules for legal/payment defaults.

critical_findings.finding: Global MSA is edited as raw legal text without an effective-terms summary or version status.
critical_findings.risk: Users cannot quickly verify what clients will accept.
critical_findings.recommended_direction: Add effective-terms preview and last-saved/version status.

critical_findings.finding: Soft UI drift exists across warnings, save bars, modal/crop surfaces, shadows, and some border treatments.
critical_findings.risk: The app loses the strong Lance neo-brutal identity in important system surfaces.
critical_findings.recommended_direction: Codify token rules for hard shadows, black borders, no-radius cards, warnings, modals, and disabled states.

critical_findings.finding: Profile tablet layout can horizontally overflow.
critical_findings.risk: Tablet users get a visually unstable settings page.
critical_findings.recommended_direction: Treat tablet as its own breakpoint and collapse header/actions before overflow.

critical_findings.finding: Mobile profile tabs and sticky save behavior need tightening.
critical_findings.risk: Profile completion feels cramped and error-prone on mobile.
critical_findings.recommended_direction: Use a clearer mobile settings switcher and reserve bottom space for save actions.

semantic_replacement_map.plain_language_support: When ownership moves to the client
Fee charged when client pays late
Free edits and paid extra edits

recommended_implementation_sequence.name: Launch blockers
items: Make profile + Global MSA save reliable and error-visible.

recommended_implementation_sequence.name: Legal and profile trust
items: Add validation constraints to payment terms, late fee, revisions, and relevant compliance fields.

recommended_implementation_sequence.name: Client-facing invoice refinement
items: Audit all templates against a strict final-invoice data contract.
Separate agency preview affordances from client-facing invoice content.

recommended_implementation_sequence.name: Design system hardening
items: Normalize badges, spacing, shadows, borders, and typography scale.

handoff_instruction_for_next_agent: Read this JSON first, then read design_system.md and the three sanitized markdown reports. Do not request or rely on raw screenshots/JSON from the repository. Do not implement until the user approves the blueprint or explicitly asks for a scoped fix.

proposed_implementation_plan.title: Phase 0: Launch Blocker Resolutions
proposed_implementation_plan.description: This plan addresses the P0 and P1 functional bugs discovered during the 14-round audit, focusing strictly on data persistence and schema-cache issues.

steps.action: Audit the saveInvoice function to ensure it uses a single transactional RPC call or implements strict manual rollback logic if the invoice insertion fails after a client/project creation. Check the foreign key relationships to ensure client_id and project_id constraints are met exactly as PostgREST expects.

In upsertProfile and syncGlobalMsaFromProfile, verify that the Supabase response error object is explicitly checked. Wrap these in strict try/catch blocks and return typed objects. Wire up the returned error state to visually block the 'Success' toast.
Add strict Zod or runtime validation checks to upsertProfile before attempting to push to Supabase.
